dailyNews.title: Supreme Court appears skeptical of Trump administration birthright citizenship arguments

dailyNews.title: Trump becomes first sitting U.S. president to attend Supreme Court arguments
dailyNews.description: President Trump became the first sitting U.S. president to attend a Supreme Court hearing after showing up on Wednesday to listen to arguments on his birthright citizenship executive order. CBS News' Natalie Brand has more.
